overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character exploring an ancient Egyptian temple complex. The character walks through covered walkways, hieroglyphic corridors, and palm-filled courtyards before swimming through a lily-filled water garden.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with wooden pergola and hanging fabrics

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through covered pergola walkway with shield on back

entered.detail: wooden lattice structure overhead with climbing vines
large ceramic urn with blue and white patterns
white cloth banners hanging from the pergola structure
painted stone columns with green and gold decorative bands

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered walkway shaded by a wooden pergola. White fabric banners hang overhead, and large decorative urns sit beside stone columns painted with ornamental bands.

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow corridor with hieroglyphics on both walls, passing a guard

notable_agents.action: guard in metal helmet and white tunic standing against the wall

entered.detail: white stone walls covered with colorful Egyptian hieroglyphics and figures
large stone statues of figures in ancient Egyptian dress
tall stone columns lining the corridor exit

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow corridor with walls covered in colorful hieroglyphics. Large stone statues stand in niches along the walls. A guard in a metal helmet stands to the right as the character approaches the corridor exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with palm trees and patterned carpets

events.description: exits narrow corridor into bright open courtyard with palm trees and statues

agents.ego_description: walking through sunlit courtyard and garden path lined with palm trees and decorative urns

entered.detail: tall palm trees with green fronds casting shadows on the ground
red and beige geometric patterned carpets covering the stone floor
white stone steps leading up to a building entrance
large black and gold decorative urns placed along the path
raised beds with tropical plants and red flowers

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the corridor, the scene opens into a bright sunlit courtyard filled with palm trees. Patterned carpets cover the stone walkways, and large decorative urns line the path. The character walks past garden beds toward a lily pond in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: water garden with lily pads and narrow canal

events.description: character enters the lily pond and begins swimming through the water canal
character exits the water onto stone pathway surrounded by vegetation

agents.ego_description: swimming through narrow water canal surrounded by lily pads and aquatic plants

entered.detail: shallow water filled with large green lily pads
narrow water channel lined with stone walls and aquatic plants
low stone walls bordering the water canal
tall grasses and water plants growing along the canal edges

segments.scene_description: The character steps into a lily-filled pond and swims through a narrow water canal. Large lily pads float on the surface while palm trees and stone walls line the channel. The character continues swimming through the aquatic garden before exiting onto a stone pathway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shaded interiors of a temple complex into a bright, aquatic garden. It begins beneath a wooden pergola where white fabric banners hang over stone columns and decorative urns. As the character moves forward, the open walkway narrows into a corridor of colorful hieroglyphics and stone statues, passing a helmeted guard before reaching the exit. The scene then opens into a sun-drenched courtyard filled with palm trees and patterned carpets, leading the character past garden beds toward a distant pond. Finally, the camera follows the character as they step into the water, swimming through a narrow canal lined with lily pads and stone walls before emerging back onto a stone pathway.
